---
title: "Starting Microprocesor Labs!"
description: "Beginning my Microprocessors Journey"
author: ""
date: "5/14/26"
categories:
  - Microprocessors
  - labreport
draft: false
---

This fall semester (2026), I will be taking an upper division course called [Microprocessors Systems: Design & Application](https://hmc-e155.github.io) which focuses on microcontrollers and embedded system design, and how to apply HDL and logic to the real world. My goal this semester is to focus on having a thorough engineering workflow. I want to not only understand and create embedded and physical systems, but also document these processes thoroughly.
